ast.name: log
ast.source: Automatic Linker: allFiles for Trie building:
ast.target: 自动链接器：用于构建 Trie 的 allFiles：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the file will be automatically formatted (links replaced) when saving.
ast.target: 启用后，保存时文件将自动格式化（替换链接）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin will use Obsidian's 'Folder to create new notes in' setting as the base directory for omitting folder prefixes in links.
ast.target: 启用后，插件将使用 Obsidian 的“创建新笔记的文件夹”设置作为基础目录，以省略链接中的文件夹前缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, aliases will be included when processing links. Note: A restart is required for changes to take effect.
ast.target: 启用后，处理链接时将包含别名。注意：需要重启才能使更改生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin will automatically resolve namespaces for shorthand links. If multiple candidates share the same shorthand, the candidate with the most common path segments relative to the current file will be selected.
ast.target: 启用后，插件将自动为简写链接解析命名空间。如果多个候选项共享相同简写，将选择相对于当前文件具有最多共同路径片段的候选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, links that match date formats (e.g. 2025-02-10) will be ignored. This helps maintain compatibility with Obsidian Tasks.
ast.target: 启用后，将忽略匹配日期格式（例如 2025-02-10）的链接。这有助于与 Obsidian Tasks 保持兼容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, link matching will be case-insensitive. The original case of the text will be preserved in the link.
ast.target: 启用后，链接匹配将不区分大小写。链接中将保留文本的原始大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When 'Ignore case' is OFF, match text that is capitalized at the start of a sentence. For example, 'My name' at a sentence start will match the file 'my name'. This setting is ignored when 'Ignore case' is ON.
ast.target: 当“Ignore case”为 OFF 时，匹配句首首字母大写的文本。例如，句首的“My name”将匹配文件“my name”。当“Ignore case”为 ON 时，此设置将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, text will not be linked to its own file. For example, the word 'VPN' inside VPN.md will not be converted to a link.
ast.target: 启用后，文本不会链接到其自身文件。例如，VPN.md 中的单词“VPN”不会被转换为链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Obsidian Linter will be executed after Automatic Linker formatting. This requires the Obsidian Linter plugin to be installed.
ast.target: 启用后，Automatic Linker 格式化完成后将执行 Obsidian Linter。这需要安装 Obsidian Linter 插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Prettier will be executed after Automatic Linker formatting. This requires prettier-format plugin to be installed. https://github.com/dylanarmstrong/obsidian-prettier-plugin
ast.target: 启用后，Automatic Linker 格式化完成后将执行 Prettier。这需要安装 prettier-format 插件。https://github.com/dylanarmstrong/obsidian-prettier-plugin

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in milliseconds before formatting. Increase this value if the linter/prettier runs before the file is fully saved.
ast.target: 格式化前的延迟（毫秒）。如果 linter/prettier 在文件完全保存前运行，请增大此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, raw URLs will be replaced with [Page Title](URL). Requires fetching the URL content.
ast.target: 启用后，原始 URL 将替换为 [Page Title](URL)。需要获取 URL 内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ignore domains for replacing URLs with titles, one per line (e.g. x.com)
ast.target: 替换 URL 为标题时要忽略的域名，每行一个（例如 x.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, GitHub URLs will be formatted when saving the file.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时将格式化 GitHub URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add your GitHub Enterprise URLs, one per line (e.g. github.enterprise.com)
ast.target: 添加你的 GitHub Enterprise URL，每行一个（例如 github.enterprise.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, JIRA URLs will be formatted when saving the file.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时将格式化 JIRA URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add your JIRA URLs, one per line (e.g. jira.enterprise.com)
ast.target: 添加你的 JIRA URL，每行一个（例如 jira.enterprise.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Linear URLs will be formatted when saving the file.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时会格式化 Linear URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notice when markdown files are loaded.
ast.target: 在加载 Markdown 文件时显示提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, debug information will be logged to the console.
ast.target: 启用后，调试信息将记录到控制台。

ast.target: 保存时格式化
